(l) These rules may be called the Warehousing (Developmenl and Regulation) Registration of Warehouses (Amendment) Rules, 2021. (2) They shall come into force on the date oftheir publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In lhe Warehousing (Development and Regulation) Regisration of Warehouses Rules, 2017, (herein after referred to as the said rules) in the Third Schedule, in the paragraph, occurring after the table, for the words and figure "the fee shall be Rs. 5,0001" the words "or a Self Help Group, the fees shall be rupees five hundred" shall be substituted. 3. In thc said rules, in the Seventh Schedule, in the paragraph, occurring after the table, after the words "Cooperatirc Crcdit Socicty". thc word "or Sclf Hclp Croup" shall bc inscned. [F. No.TFC-04-2016] NANDITA GUPTA, Jt. Secy.
